FREE FOREVER INSTANT SETTLEMENT 3.33% P.A. ON IDLE NO FX, NO HIDDEN FEES BUILT IN AUSTRALIA FREE FOREVER INSTANT SETTLEMENT 3.33% P.A. ON IDLE NO FX, NO HIDDEN FEES BUILT IN AUSTRALIA
Why Sorted

Built for the everyday P2P bit.

Splitting dinner. Paying your mate back. Sending Mum a hundred for her birthday. None of it should cost you, take three days, or need a 16-digit card number. So it doesn't.

The big one

Your idle balance earns 3.33% p.a. Paid daily.

Money sitting in your bank account earns you basically nothing. Money sitting in Sorted earns 3.33% p.a., paid out every morning. Same model the big neobanks use — your reserves earn interest at tier-1 Aussie banks, and we pass most of it back. No tier, no minimum, no lock-up.

Average bank txn account ~0.0%
Sorted balance 3.33% p.a.
Bank "high interest" hoops 5+ rules
Sorted hoops Zero
Instant. Actually instant.

Send to any @handle. Under 2 seconds.

No BSB, no account number, no "pending until tomorrow". Type a handle, type an amount, slide to send. The money's in their account before you've put your phone down. Even at 3am on a Sunday.

Free, full stop

No fees. Anywhere.

$0 to top up. $0 to send. $0 to receive. $0 to hold. We make our money on the spread between bank deposit rates and what we pay you — same way Wise and Revolut do. You shouldn't have to.

Sign in with your phone

Crypto under the hood. Not in your face.

No wallet downloads. No seed phrases. No "what's gas?". Sign in with your number, verify once, you're sorted. The fact that this all settles on Solana is our problem, not yours.

Backed 1:1 by AUD

Real Aussie dollars. Real Aussie banks.

Every dollar in Sorted is backed 1:1 by AUDD — issued by Novatti under an Australian financial services licence, with reserves held in tier-1 banks here at home. Not offshore. Not in stablecoins of stablecoins.

How it works

Easy as. Three taps.

Whether it's a $5 coffee debt or splitting rent with three flatmates — same flow, same speed, same zero fees.

01

Top up free

Link your Aussie bank once. Move money in instantly via PayID — no card surcharge, no "1% loading fee" buried at the bottom of the screen.

PayID · Free · Instant
02

Send to @anyone

Type a handle, type an amount, slide to send. Lands in their account in under two seconds. Doesn't matter if it's Saturday night or Christmas morning.

No BSB · No delay · No fee
03

Earn while you wait

Anything sitting in your balance earns 3.33% p.a., paid every morning at 9am. No tier, no hoops, no "minimum spend $2,000 this month". Just yield.

3.33% p.a. · Paid daily · No lock-up
Earn

Always earning.

Same model the big neobanks use to fund their interest accounts — your reserves earn ~4% at tier-1 Aussie banks, and we pass most of it back. Watch your balance tick up in real time on the Earn tab.

  • Paid every day at 9am. Not monthly. Not "when you reach the threshold". Daily.
  • No lock-up. No minimum. Spend or send any second. Yield resumes the moment money's back in.
  • Same rate for everyone. No "introductory" rate. No tiered nonsense for balances over $5k. 3.33%, full stop.
Earned so far on $1,000
$12.4837
3.33% p.a. · Live
Today
$0.0625
Per year
$33.30
The pitch

FAST. FREE. EARNING.

We're not "disrupting finance" or "leveraging Web3". We charge zero, settle in seconds, and pay you a fair rate on the money sitting still. That's it. That's the whole thing.

$0
Fees to send, receive, top up, or hold. Forever. Always.
1.4 sec
Average settlement time, measured tap-to-balance
3.33%
Paid daily on every dollar in your balance, no questions asked
The honest version

Fair dinkum AUD.

Every dollar in Sorted is backed 1:1 by AUDD — a fully-reserved Australian dollar token issued by Novatti, an AFSL-licensed Australian financial services provider. Reserves are held in tier-1 banks here at home.

The Solana settlement layer is just plumbing. You don't need to know what it is, or care. We chose it because it's fast and cheap, and that's why your sends land in seconds and cost you nothing.

Read about AUDD →

AFSL-regulated issuer
AUDD is issued by Novatti under an Australian Financial Services Licence. Audited regularly.
1:1 backed by AUD
Every token is backed by an Australian dollar in a tier-1 Australian bank account. Redeemable 1:1, any time.
Reserves in Australia
Not offshore. Not in another stablecoin. Reserves sit in regulated Aussie banks earning the RBA cash rate.
Settled on Solana
Fast, cheap rails. Sub-second settlement, fractions of a cent in network cost. We absorb that — you don't pay it.
Questions

Fair questions.

No legalese. No "industry-leading". Just real answers to the things you'd ask a mate over a beer.

Wait — is this crypto?
Technically the rails are crypto rails, yeah. But you'll never see a wallet address, a seed phrase, or a gas fee. You sign in with your phone number, type a handle, and money moves. The blockchain part is plumbing — same as how you don't think about TCP/IP when you send a text.
How do you make money if everything's free?
Same way Wise and Revolut do. Reserves backing the AUDD in your account earn around 4% per year in tier-1 Aussie banks. We pay you 3.33% and keep the small spread (about 0.6%) to run the company. No transaction fees, no FX margin, no card fluff. If we ever can't sustain a fair yield, we'll say so plainly — won't dress it up.
Is the 3.33% guaranteed?
Nope, and we won't pretend it is. The rate moves with the RBA cash rate — if the RBA cuts, eventually our rate cuts. If they hike, we lift. We commit to passing through fairly and being upfront about it. Right now the maths works at 3.33% comfortably with the RBA at 4.10%.
What happens if Sorted goes under?
Your balance isn't on Sorted's books — it's AUDD, issued by Novatti, backed 1:1 by AUD held in tier-1 Aussie bank accounts. If we vanished tomorrow, your AUDD is still redeemable through Novatti directly. We don't custody your money in the traditional sense; we're the front door, not the vault.
Can I send money overseas?
Not yet. v1 is intentionally narrow — Australian P2P only. International sends and a debit card are on the roadmap, but we'd rather nail the simple thing first than ship a half-broken everything-app. Coming later this year.
How does top-up actually work?
Through PayID/NPP — the same instant transfer rail your bank already uses. Link your bank once, send AUD to your Sorted PayID, and AUDD lands in your balance within seconds. No card surcharge, no "1% loading fee". And to cash out, just send back to your bank — same speed, same zero cost.
Who's behind this?
Built in Brisbane by a small team that got tired of money taking three days to move between people who already know each other. We're operating as an authorised representative under an Australian financial services licensee, not flying solo on a "we'll figure out compliance later" ticket.

Right then.
Let's get it sorted.

Join the beta, claim your @handle, and start sending money the way it should've worked all along. Takes 90 seconds. No card needed.
